why: Reworked all 11 @rubric scenarios on sdd/ssa-lowering so the instrument can register a miss (#221, Refs #211). Issue named 3 scenarios; conductor audit found ALL 11 repeat one authoring template -- [live 3] + [restatement/procedural 3] + [presence 2], threshold = max-2 -- so the bar was clearable by a doctrine scoring 1 of 3 on the only dimension measuring judgment. Owner widened scope to all 11 in-session. Surgery: deleted presence-grading (reasoning-recorded x3, provenance-kept) and moved shown-work to a new boolean guard (presence -> boolean guard, judgment -> rubric); folded 12 restatement/entailment dims into what they restate (clearest: not-optimistic = conservative-default negated); dropped the -before-lowering clause (procedural compliance, not judgment). Thresholds max-2 -> sum(max)-1 on 10/11. Doctrine (SKILL.md) untouched -- the instrument was broken, not the doctrine. Givens untouched: PR #215 already re-cut them off the worked examples and Given surgery is a proven dead end. Cold aced-spec-validator round 2: oracle/builder/architect all PASS, ALIGNED true, BLOCKER null, floors hand-verified below threshold on all 11 (most 0). Zero open markers. pnpm verify 21/21. THREE weaknesses DECLARED not hidden: irreducible not yet trustworthy (Given hands over both graded answers; a parroting doctrine can plausibly reach threshold -- needs a Given edit, out of scope); misaligned has the thinnest measured margin (5.33 vs 5) and this pass added load to it; cohesion is 1-dim at threshold=max with no genuine second facet available (padding would reintroduce the #221 defect) -- impl gate measures it, action pre-registered (below 3.0 mean on a correct doctrine -> demote to boolean, never pad). Residual risk is all false-RED, the correct direction for an instrument whose measured defect was false-GREEN. Clearance did NOT fire: #215 removed @frozen and never restored it, so the node was already re-opened; this gate re-freezes. Round 1 was REJECTED by the cold judge (correction line logged): it silently reverted merged PR #215 because the mission branch was cut from a pre-#215 base -- fixed by fast-forwarding onto the target and redoing the surgery on #215's Givens. HIGH blast (SDD planning doctrine contract); leash auto-none -- human-ratified in-session by unional.
